title: The Embalmer
writer: Paolo Lombardo, Gian Battista Mussetto, Dino Tavella
actors: Maureen Brown, Luigi Martocci, Alcide Gazzotto
plot: A crazed killer is on the loose in the catacombs of Venice, Italy. He stalks beautiful women, drags them to his underground lair, kills them, then stuffs them and adds them to his "collection."
